name: Redstone
description_short: Redstone Federal Credit Union is a $7.5B federally chartered credit union based in Huntsville, Alabama, serving North Alabama and Central Tennessee with 27 branches and comprehensive banking services.
description_long:
Redstone Federal Credit Union was founded in 1951 to serve employees of the Redstone Arsenal, beginning with just 11 members and $55 in assets. Over 75 years, it has grown into one of Alabama's largest credit unions with $7.5 billion in total assets and 1,357 employees as of 2025. The institution is federally chartered, regulated, and insured by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), ensuring member deposits are protected.

Redstone offers a comprehensive suite of financial products and services including savings accounts, checking accounts, consumer loans, mortgages, credit cards, investment services, and insurance products. The credit union also provides small business financing and cash management solutions through its real estate department, which specializes in mortgage products and home equity loans. Members have access to over 75,000 ATMs throughout the United States, providing broad cash access and convenience.

The credit union distinguishes itself through its regional footprint across North Alabama and Central Tennessee with 27 branches, and its specialization in serving the Redstone Arsenal employee community and surrounding areas. In 2018, Redstone was recognized as Credit Union of the Year by the National Association of Federally Insured Credit Unions, reflecting institutional quality and member service standards. The organization operates subsidiaries including Redstone Services Group, LLC and Redstone Title Services, expanding service capabilities beyond traditional banking.

As a credit union, Redstone operates on a member-owned, not-for-profit basis, which typically results in lower fees and better rates compared to traditional banks. However, membership eligibility may be restricted based on employment, geography, or other membership criteria typical of credit unions. The broad product range and substantial asset base position Redstone as a full-service financial institution suitable for comprehensive banking needs in its service region.
services: Title services (through Redstone Title Services subsidiary)
pros: Federally chartered and NCUA-insured, ensuring member deposit protection up to $250,000
Large asset base of $7.5 billion provides financial stability and competitive loan products
Extensive ATM network access to over 75,000 ATMs nationwide for members
Comprehensive service offerings including mortgages, small business financing, investments, and insurance under one institution
Recognized as Credit Union of the Year (2018) by the National Association of Federally Insured Credit Unions
27 branches across North Alabama and Central Tennessee for in-person service accessibility
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure typically results in competitive rates and lower fees
cons: Membership eligibility may be restricted based on employment history, geography, or other credit union membership criteria
Service area is limited to North Alabama and Central Tennessee, making it inaccessible for consumers outside this region
Limited information available regarding specific APRs, fees, or product terms on the public-facing Wikipedia source
No mention of digital banking capabilities, mobile apps, or online-only accounts that modern consumers expect
Smaller branch network compared to major national banks, limiting physical accessibility for some customers
best_for: Huntsville-area residents and Redstone Arsenal employees seeking comprehensive, locally-based banking services
North Alabama and Central Tennessee consumers wanting member-owned financial institution with NCUA insurance protection
Small business owners in the service region needing integrated business financing and cash management solutions
Consumers seeking full-service banking (mortgages, investments, insurance) from a single established institution
diagnosis: Redstone Federal Credit Union is best for Huntsville-area residents, Redstone Arsenal employees, and businesses in North Alabama and Central Tennessee seeking comprehensive banking from an established, stable, member-owned institution. Primary consideration is membership eligibility restrictions and geographic service limitations, as the credit union does not serve consumers outside its designated regional footprint.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
